title: Straw Hats Hold the Line
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Sanji, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Beast Pirates as The raid becomes a series of decisive matchups while Luffy challenges Kaido and the Straw Hats protect their allies.
scene: The Onigashima raid breaks into decisive one-on-one and group battles as Luffy, Yamato, Momonosuke, and the Straw Hats push against Kaido’s forces.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I suppose you were also part of that insane research team?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You mean maids? That's ancient history.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Now, check me out!! I'm a gYBORG, so I've got a whole bunch of tricks up my sleeve!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That knowledge won't save you though!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Chopper, you holding up over there?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You Betcha!! Im right as rain... just keep your eyes on the prize!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I can't help but worry when you look like that...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I have been using a new

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I had no clue you had this sort of remedy on 2011!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's a super recovery drug, right? I can't administer it by my lonesome.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: right away, but we should warn him...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Taking this can cause one's pain to double after it wears off.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no time to worry about that, just give it to me already!! Huff... huff

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Did you hear a word I said?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't care what happens to my body after this...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I don't get what's going on, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I guess I can't afford to go easy on you now....!!

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 37 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
